name: xianjiawei-lineoa

scripts.postinstall: node --check server.js && node --check social-server.js && node --check social-publish-guard.js && node --check social-publication-ledger-backfill.js && node --check social-recommended-schedule.js && node --check social-final-posts.js && node --check social-final-approved-batch.js && node --check social-schedule-repair-20260722.js && node --check social-schedule-policy.js && node --check social-manual-schedule-override.js && node --check social-review-center.js && node --check facebook-page-token-bridge.js && node --check facebook-token-health-route.js && node --check internal-app-client-fix.js && node --check internal-app-form-controller.js && node --check internal-app-social-filter.js && node --check internal-app-social-retry.js && node --check internal-app-facebook-health.js && node --check internal-entry.js
scripts.start: node --check social-server.js && node --check social-publish-guard.js && node --check social-publication-ledger-backfill.js && node --check social-recommended-schedule.js && node --check social-final-posts.js && node --check social-final-approved-batch.js && node --check social-schedule-repair-20260722.js && node --check social-schedule-policy.js && node --check social-manual-schedule-override.js && node --check social-review-center.js && node --check facebook-page-token-bridge.js && node --check facebook-token-health-route.js && node --check internal-app-client-fix.js && node --check internal-app-form-controller.js && node --check internal-app-social-filter.js && node --check internal-app-social-retry.js && node --check internal-app-facebook-health.js && node --check internal-entry.js && node -r ./social-recommended-schedule.js -r ./social-final-approved-batch.js -r ./social-schedule-repair-20260722.js -r ./social-schedule-policy.js -r ./social-manual-schedule-override.js -r ./social-publication-ledger-backfill.js -r ./disable-auto-knowledge-cards.js -r ./internal-social-upload-approved-patch.js -r ./facebook-page-token-bridge.js -r ./facebook-token-health-route.js -r ./line-image-safety.js -r ./internal-app-pro.js -r ./internal-app-security-patch.js -r ./social-title-normalizer.js -r ./social-review-center.js internal-entry.js

description: 仙加味 LINE OA 正式版｜社群關心圖統一輸出1080×1080｜跨貼文ID持久化指紋防重複並由成功歷史自動回填｜成功平台補發時不再次發布｜週三19:30關心、週五20:00產品、氣候10:00例外加發
